tasks.subject: Task 1: seedWallLayout() in wallGeometry.js
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure helper producing non-overlapping regions sized to code count + grid wallPositions fully inside each region.

**Files:** src/utils/wallGeometry.js, src/utils/wallGeometry.test.js

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/utils/wallGeometry.js", "src/utils/wallGeometry.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npm test -- --watchAll=false --testMatch \"**/.claude/**/src/**/*.{spec,test}.{js,jsx,ts,tsx}\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["cards fully inside regions", "no region overlap", "min size 440x320", "existing regions reused", "unthemed codes skipped"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Wire seeding into ImportModal
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Import dispatches ADD_REGION per new theme and patches wallPosition onto assigned codes + new themes.

**Files:** src/components/modals/ImportModal.js

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/modals/ImportModal.js"], "verifyCommand": "npm test -- --watchAll=false --testMatch \"**/.claude/**/src/**/*.{spec,test}.{js,jsx,ts,tsx}\" && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["regions dispatched", "codes patched with wallPosition", "themes get region-center wallPosition", "clearFirst handled"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: WallView self-heal + E2E for import seeding
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Mount-time self-heal seeds default regions for pre-fix saved states; E2E proves import→Wall→drag keeps assignment.

**Files:** src/components/wall/WallView.js, e2e/app.spec.js

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/wall/WallView.js", "e2e/app.spec.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx playwright test --reporter=list", "acceptanceCriteria": ["self-heal mount-only idempotent", "e2e regions count 9", "drag keeps assignment"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: outlineTransform.js (pure) with tests


tasks.subject: Task 5: OutlineView component; replace Sankey everywhere
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Div-based Outline view wired into App/Toolbar/HelpOverlay; Sankey files and d3-sankey removed.

**Files:** src/components/outline/OutlineView.js (new), src/App.js, src/components/Toolbar.js, src/components/help/HelpOverlay.js, package.json; delete src/components/sankey/*, src/utils/sankeyTransform*

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/outline/OutlineView.js", "src/App.js", "src/components/Toolbar.js", "src/components/help/HelpOverlay.js", "package.json"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build && npm test -- --watchAll=false --testMatch \"**/.claude/**/src/**/*.{spec,test}.{js,jsx,ts,tsx}\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["bands+chips+matrix render", "interactions parity", "export id present", "no sankey references remain"]}
```
